race.comment: SINGLE CHOICE (1) looks the one to beat. He ran on strongly to beat Arcora two back in the G2 Autumn Classic here then kept coming in the G2 Alistair Clark last time when fifth. Everything he's done recently suggests he'll relish 2400m now and this race lacks any sort of depth. AMAZAKE (4) did beat SINGLE CHOICE home last time and didn't have a whole lot of luck either. He did start $41 there (SINGLE CHOICE was $8) so we'd just be wary of steaming in at much shorter odds this time but he's a clear danger. ARABIAN PRINCE (6) was sent for an easy kill at Kilmore and broke his maiden easily. He'll relish 2400m and has always promised good staying ability, sixth in the Victoria Derby in the Spring. LUNAR FORCE (9) is lightly raced and could improve into the finish. ROYAL OPTIMISM (11) won well last time and should stay it strongly.
